    print(f''✓ Grobid client created, available: {client.is_available}'')

    traceback.print_exc()

Bash(UNPAYWALL_EMAIL="test@example.edu" python3 -c "
import metadata_fetcher as mf

print(''=== FUNCTIONAL AUDIT: UNPAYWALL INTEGRATION ==='')
try:
    result = mf.query_unpaywall(''10.1371/journal.pone.0000001'')
    if result and ''is_open_access'' in result:
        print(f''✅ Unpaywall API working: Open Access = {result[""is_open_access""]}'')
        print(f''✅ OA Locations: {len(result.get(""oa_locations"", []))} found'')
        if result.get(''best_oa_location''):
            print(f''✅ Best OA URL provided'')
        else:
            print(f''⚠️ No best OA URL'')
    else:
        print(''❌ Unpaywall API failed or incomplete response'')
except Exception as e:
    print(f''❌ Unpaywall API error: {e}'')

print()
print(''=== FUNCTIONAL AUDIT: SUBJECT CLASSIFICATION ==='')
test_cases = [
    (''Stochastic Differential Equations'', [''probability_statistics'', ''analysis'']),
    (''Group Theory and Lie Algebras'', [''algebra'']),
    (''Graph Theory'', [''discrete_mathematics'']),
    (''Partial Differential Equations'', [''analysis''])
]

passed = 0
for title, expected_subjects in test_cases:
    subjects = mf.classify_mathematical_subject(title)
    if any(exp in subjects for exp in expected_subjects):
        print(f''✅ ""{title}"" -> {subjects}'')
        passed += 1
    else:
        print(f''❌ ""{title}"" -> {subjects} (expected one of {expected_subjects})'')

print(f''Subject classification: {passed}/{len(test_cases)} tests passed'')
")

Bash(UNPAYWALL_EMAIL="test@example.edu" python3 -c "
import metadata_fetcher as mf

print(''=== INTEGRATION AUDIT: ENHANCED METADATA PIPELINE ==='')

# Test complete integration with all enhancements
results = mf.fetch_metadata_all_sources(
    ''Mathematical Analysis'',
    doi=''10.1371/journal.pone.0000001'',
    arxiv_id=''2101.00001v1''
)

if results:
    meta = results[0]
    
    # Check all claimed metadata fields
    enhanced_fields = [
        ''is_open_access'', ''best_oa_location'', ''journal_is_oa'',  # Unpaywall
        ''mathematical_subjects'', ''primary_subject'', ''msc_codes'',  # Subject classification
        ''has_arxiv_updates'', ''current_arxiv_version'', ''latest_arxiv_version'', ''arxiv_versions_count''  # arXiv
    ]
    
    present_fields = 0
    for field in enhanced_fields:
        if field in meta:
            value = meta[field]
            if value is not None and value != '''' and value != []:
                print(f''✅ {field}: {value}'')
                present_fields += 1
            else:
                print(f''⚠️ {field}: Present but empty/null'')
        else:
            print(f''❌ {field}: Missing'')
    
    print(f''Enhanced metadata fields: {present_fields}/{len(enhanced_fields)} populated'')
    
    # Test flattened output
    flattened = mf.flatten_metadata_dict(meta)
    flattened_fields = [f for f in enhanced_fields if f in flattened and flattened[f] != '''']
    print(f''Flattened metadata fields: {len(flattened_fields)}/{len(enhanced_fields)} present'')
    
else:
    print(''❌ No metadata returned from enhanced pipeline'')
")

import os

Bash(UNPAYWALL_EMAIL="test@example.edu" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''scripts'')
import downloader as dl
import tempfile
import time

print(''=== TESTING INTEGRATED DOWNLOAD + TASK QUEUE ==='')

# Setup task queue
queue = dl.setup_download_task_queue()
if not queue:
    print(''❌ Task queue setup failed'')
    exit(1)

print(''✅ Task queue setup successful'')

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp_dir:
    print(f''Test directory: {tmp_dir}'')
    
    # Add download task to queue
    task_id = queue.add_task(
        queue.TaskType.DOWNLOAD_PAPER,
        {
            ''title'': ''Neural Substrate'',
            ''dst_folder'': tmp_dir,
            ''doi'': ''10.1371/journal.pone.0000001''
        },
        priority=queue.Priority.HIGH
    )
    
    print(f''✅ Added download task: {task_id[:8]}...'')
    
    # Start workers
    queue.start_workers(num_workers=1)
    
    # Wait for completion
    time.sleep(3)
    
    # Check result
    task = queue.get_task(task_id)
    print(f''Task status: {task.status.value}'')
    
    if task.status.value == ''completed'':
        result = task.result
        print(f''✅ Download successful: {result[""success""]}'')
        print(f''  File path: {result.get(""file_path"")}'')
        print(f''  Attempts: {result.get(""attempts"")}'')
        print(f''  Strategies: {result.get(""strategies_used"")}'')
    else:
        print(f''❌ Task failed or incomplete: {task.error_message}'')
    
    # Stop workers
    queue.stop_workers()
    
    # Show final stats
    stats = queue.get_stats()
    print(f''Final stats: {stats[""by_status""]}'')

print(''Integrated system test complete!'')
")

import sys
sys.path.append(''scripts'')
import downloader as dl
import task_queue as tq
import tempfile
import time

print(''=== TESTING INTEGRATED DOWNLOAD + TASK QUEUE (FIXED) ==='')

# Setup task queue
queue = dl.setup_download_task_queue()
if not queue:
    print(''❌ Task queue setup failed'')
    exit(1)

print(''✅ Task queue setup successful'')

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp_dir:
    print(f''Test directory: {tmp_dir}'')
    
    # Add download task to queue
    task_id = queue.add_task(
        tq.TaskType.DOWNLOAD_PAPER,
        {
            ''title'': ''Neural Substrate'',
            ''dst_folder'': tmp_dir,
            ''doi'': ''10.1371/journal.pone.0000001''
        },
        priority=tq.Priority.HIGH
    )
    
    print(f''✅ Added download task: {task_id[:8]}...'')
    
    # Start workers
    queue.start_workers(num_workers=1)
    
    # Wait for completion
    time.sleep(3)
    
    # Check result
    task = queue.get_task(task_id)
    print(f''Task status: {task.status.value}'')
    
    if task.status.value == ''completed'':
        result = task.result
        print(f''✅ Download successful: {result[""success""]}'')
        print(f''  File path: {result.get(""file_path"", ""None"")[-20:] if result.get(""file_path"") else ""None""}'')
        print(f''  Attempts: {result.get(""attempts"")}'')
        print(f''  Strategies: {result.get(""strategies_used"")}'')
    else:
        print(f''❌ Task failed or incomplete: {task.error_message}'')
    
    # Stop workers
    queue.stop_workers()
    
    # Show final stats
    stats = queue.get_stats()
    print(f''Final stats: {stats[""by_status""]}'')

print(''Integrated system test complete!'')
")

Bash(UNPAYWALL_EMAIL="test@example.edu" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''scripts'')
import downloader as dl
import tempfile

print(''=== FUNCTIONAL AUDIT: OPENACCESS STRATEGY ==='')

# Test OpenAccessStrategy
strategy = dl.OpenAccessStrategy()

# Test metadata that should have open access
oa_metadata = {
    ''is_open_access'': True,
    ''best_oa_location'': ''https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article/file?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0000001&type=printable'',
    ''oa_locations'': [
        {''url'': ''https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article/file?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0000001&type=printable''}
    ]
}

can_handle = strategy.can_handle(oa_metadata)
urls = strategy.get_download_urls(oa_metadata)

print(f''✅ Can handle OA metadata: {can_handle}'')
print(f''✅ URLs found: {len(urls)}'')

# Test non-OA metadata
non_oa_metadata = {''is_open_access'': False}
can_handle_non_oa = strategy.can_handle(non_oa_metadata)
print(f''✅ Correctly rejects non-OA: {not can_handle_non_oa}'')

print()
print(''=== FUNCTIONAL AUDIT: INSTITUTIONAL STRATEGY ==='')

inst_strategy = dl.InstitutionalStrategy()

# Test DOI metadata
doi_metadata = {''DOI'': ''10.1234/test''}
can_handle_doi = inst_strategy.can_handle(doi_metadata)
urls_doi = inst_strategy.get_download_urls(doi_metadata)

print(f''✅ Can handle DOI metadata: {can_handle_doi}'')
print(f''✅ DOI URLs generated: {len(urls_doi)}'')
print(f''✅ DOI URL format correct: {urls_doi[0].startswith(""https://doi.org/"")}'')

# Test empty metadata
empty_metadata = {}
can_handle_empty = inst_strategy.can_handle(empty_metadata)
print(f''✅ Correctly rejects empty metadata: {not can_handle_empty}'')
")

Bash(UNPAYWALL_EMAIL="test@example.edu" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''scripts'')
import downloader as dl
import tempfile
import os

print(''=== FUNCTIONAL AUDIT: ACQUISITION ENGINE ==='')

# Test AcquisitionEngine
engine = dl.AcquisitionEngine()

print(f''✅ Engine created with {len(engine.strategies)} strategies'')
strategy_names = [s.name for s in engine.strategies]
print(f''✅ Strategy names: {strategy_names}'')

# Test with real metadata (but use temp directory)
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp_dir:
    metadata = {
        ''title'': ''Test Paper'',
        ''is_open_access'': True,
        ''best_oa_location'': ''https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article/file?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0000001&type=printable'',
        ''DOI'': ''10.1371/journal.pone.0000001''
    }
    
    # Test acquisition
    attempts = engine.acquire_paper(metadata, tmp_dir)
    successful = engine.get_successful_download(attempts)
    
    print(f''✅ Acquisition attempts: {len(attempts)}'')
    for attempt in attempts:
        print(f''  Strategy: {attempt.strategy}, Result: {attempt.result.value}'')
    
    if successful:
        print(f''✅ Successful download: {successful.file_path}'')
        if os.path.exists(successful.file_path):
            size = os.path.getsize(successful.file_path)
            print(f''✅ File exists with size: {size} bytes'')
        else:
            print(f''❌ File path reported but file missing'')
    else:
        print(f''❌ No successful download'')
")

Bash(UNPAYWALL_EMAIL="test@example.edu" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''scripts'')
import downloader as dl
import tempfile
import os

print(''=== FUNCTIONAL AUDIT: COMPLETE PIPELINE ==='')

# Test complete metadata → download pipeline
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp_dir:
    print(f''Test directory: {tmp_dir}'')
    
    # Test acquire_paper_by_metadata
    file_path, attempts = dl.acquire_paper_by_metadata(
        ''Neural Substrate'',
        tmp_dir,
        doi=''10.1371/journal.pone.0000001''
    )
    
    print(f''✅ Pipeline attempts: {len(attempts)}'')
    for attempt in attempts:
        print(f''  Strategy: {attempt.strategy}, Result: {attempt.result.value}'')
        if attempt.file_path:
            print(f''  File: {os.path.basename(attempt.file_path)}'')
    
    if file_path and os.path.exists(file_path):
        size = os.path.getsize(file_path)
        print(f''✅ Complete pipeline successful: {os.path.basename(file_path)} ({size} bytes)'')
        
        # Verify it''s a real PDF
        with open(file_path, ''rb'') as f:
            header = f.read(4)
            is_pdf = header == b''%PDF''
            print(f''✅ Valid PDF file: {is_pdf}'')
    else:
        print(f''❌ Complete pipeline failed'')
")

Bash(UNPAYWALL_EMAIL="test@example.edu" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.append(''scripts'')
import downloader as dl
import task_queue as tq
import tempfile
import time

print(''=== FUNCTIONAL AUDIT: INTEGRATED TASK QUEUE + DOWNLOAD ==='')

# Setup integrated system
queue = dl.setup_download_task_queue()
if not queue:
    print(''❌ Integration setup failed'')
    exit(1)

print(''✅ Integration setup successful'')

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp_dir:
    # Add download task
    task_id = queue.add_task(
        tq.TaskType.DOWNLOAD_PAPER,
        {
            ''title'': ''Neural Substrate'',
            ''dst_folder'': tmp_dir,
            ''doi'': ''10.1371/journal.pone.0000001''
        },
        priority=tq.Priority.HIGH
    )
    
    print(f''✅ Download task queued: {task_id[:8]}...'')
    
    # Execute task
    queue.start_workers(num_workers=1)
    time.sleep(3)  # Allow processing
    queue.stop_workers()
    
    # Check results
    task = queue.get_task(task_id)
    print(f''✅ Task status: {task.status.value}'')
    
    if task.status.value == ''completed'' and task.result:
        result = task.result
        print(f''✅ Download success: {result.get(""success"")}'')
        print(f''✅ Attempts made: {result.get(""attempts"")}'')
        print(f''✅ Strategies used: {result.get(""strategies_used"")}'')
        
        if result.get(''file_path''):
            import os
            if os.path.exists(result[''file_path'']):
                size = os.path.getsize(result[''file_path''])
                print(f''✅ File downloaded: {size} bytes'')
            else:
                print(f''❌ File path reported but missing'')
    else:
        print(f''❌ Task failed: {task.error_message}'')
    
    # Final stats
    stats = queue.get_stats()
    print(f''✅ Final integration stats: {stats[""by_status""]}'')
")
